community_note.title: Readers added context they thought people might want to know
community_note.summary: The $1.5 trillion military investment refers to a proposed budget request for FY2027 that has not been approved by Congress. war.gov/News/News-Stor… whitehouse.gov/wp-content/upl… csis.org/analysis/unpac…

tweets.text:
Today, I am convening a special review panel to conduct a comprehensive, long-term, department-wide review of every aspect of the military legal system impacting our servicemembers.

This panel will enhance trust, strengthen our force, drive real reform, and help ensure our warfighters receive the world-class military legal system they deserve.
tweets.text_resolved:
Today, I am convening a special review panel to conduct a comprehensive, long-term, department-wide review of every aspect of the military legal system impacting our servicemembers.

This panel will enhance trust, strengthen our force, drive real reform, and help ensure our warfighters receive the world-class military legal system they deserve.

tweets.text:
Today, we launched a historic effort at @SOUTHCOM — the first ever America’s Counter-Cartel Coalition (A3C).

Military leaders from across the Caribbean, Central America, and South America joining together to aggressively and urgently confront threats to our homeland and hemisphere.

The Trump Corollary to the Monroe Doctrine is in full effect.
